mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_comment(recipe_id, content, member_id) VALUES(#{recipeId}, #{content}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT rec.content, rec.recipe_id recipeId, rec.member_id memberId, rec.comment_id commentId, m.nickname FROM recipe_comment rec LEFT JOIN member m ON rec.member_id = m.member_id WHERE rec.recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY rec.comment_id
